description: Provider-level tool catalog for the isolated LangGraph agent console. Large command sets live in separately fetched S3-backed pack files.

tools.name: Terraform
tools.description: Terraform provider-level tool pack. Select the pack once, then choose a command from the fetched command metadata at runtime.

storage.note: Hosted with the static app origin; fetch on selection keeps the starter catalog small.
